title: KINGRACK Step Ladder, Double Side Folding Step Stool, 2 Step Portable Ladder with handdle, Large Platform, Slim Household Stepladder with Milti-fuction, Black
features: 【Foldable & Portable】 Effortlessly foldable and portable, this step ladder can be collapsed into a compact 3cm size with just a push of the red button and a pull of the handle. Its convenient handle ensures easy transportation, and its compact size allows it to fit into most narrow spaces.

【Widen Platform】 Featuring a spacious platform, this ladder provides a comfortable foothold while the anti-slip tread on the surface ensures added stability and safety. The platform measures 30*20.5 cm.
【Certificate】 Approved by the European commission EN14183, this step stool is made of thicker powder-coated metal tubes that can support a maximum load of 150kg.
【Sturdy & Safety】 Designed for safety, this ladder's 4 reinforced legs widely open to distribute weight, while its non-slip feet ensure that it stays in place and protect your floors from scratches.

【Multi-Purpose】 Whether you need it for painting, cleaning, decorating, or other household tasks, this versatile ladder is a great choice for home, office, garden, or store use. It can even be used as a seat for kids, adults, and pets.
